TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 12, Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz Van der Bellen sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, mońßame* oul* aő≤*el aziz , s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw mauritania ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mońßame* oul* aő≤*el aziz, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja mońßame* oul* aő≤*el aziz *an *er ő≤ellen s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 12, Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz Van der Bellen sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
